_doc: Config for the MISSION wizard — what you task an agent to do. The field DEFINITIONS (prompt/shape/essential) live as classes in fields.py; this file holds the non-field config plus `field_order` — the elicitation order (and which fields are active). Reorder / enable / disable a mission field by editing field_order here; the class supplies its schema. Fields reuse the shared forge shape strategies (str/csv/predicate/optfloat/toolkit).
header: ═ Author a mission ═  (title + goal required; blank = inherit the agent's default)
seal_prompt: Mission is coherent. Seal it? (blank to cancel, or type a note to confirm)
